query:
INSERT INTO `content_review_log` (`id`, `version`, `bump_type`, `trigger_type`, `trigger_detail`, `author`, `reviewer`, `changes_json`, `new_sources_json`, `test_fixtures_json`, `known_issues`, `created_at`) VALUES
('crl-initial-v130', '1.3.0', 'minor', 'quarterly_review', 'Q2 2026 quarterly review — April 2026', 'David', NULL,
 '["Added 3 new initiatives: AI-assisted exit interview analysis, AI candidate sourcing, AI L&D content generation","Updated cost ranges on 5 existing initiatives based on Q1 2026 vendor benchmarks","Added 2 new sources: src_cipd_ta_q1_2026, src_lewis_silkin_era_2025_brief","Updated last_reviewed_date on 8 sources"]',
 '[{"source_id":"src_cipd_ta_q1_2026","citation":"CIPD — Talent Acquisition and AI Q1 2026","confidence":"high"},{"source_id":"src_lewis_silkin_era_2025_brief","citation":"Lewis Silkin — ERA 2025 Implementation Brief","confidence":"high"}]',
 '[{"fixture":"Acme Retail Transformative","passed":true,"notes":"9 initiatives now include 1 new TA initiative"},{"fixture":"Mid-Market FS Progressive","passed":true,"notes":"No material change"},{"fixture":"Healthcare Cautious Followers","passed":true,"notes":"Cost envelope shifted +12% reflecting updated vendor pricing"},{"fixture":"Tech Transformative Innovators Small","passed":true,"notes":"No material change"},{"fixture":"Public Sector Moderate Followers","passed":true,"notes":"No material change"}]',
 'src_lumi_estimate still cited on 6 initiatives — research priority for next review',
 '2026-04-15 00:00:00');
